title: elaeocarpus jugahanus
intro: Elaeocarpus jugahanus is a plant species in the family Elaeocarpaceae, commonly known as the blue pepper tree, native to Malaysia. The medicinal properties of Elaeocarpus jugahanus lie in its leaves, roots, and fruits, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Elaeocarpus jugahanus is prepared in various forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
